name: Albedo
description: The Chief Alchemist and Captain of the Investigation Team of the Knights of Favonius.

name: Shikanoin Heizou
description: A young detective from the Tenryou Commission. He is a man of great intelligence and talent.

name: Alhaitham
description: The current scribe of the Sumeru Akademiya. He is a man of great intelligence and talent.

name: Aloy
description: Outcast, machine hunter, seeker, anointed, savior... Aloy had many names in her world.

name: Amber
description: Always energetic and full of life, Amber's the best — albeit only — Outrider of the Knights of Favonius.

name: Arlecchino
description: The Fourth of the Fatui Harbingers, known as 'The Knave'. She is the 'Father' of the House of the Hearth.

name: Kamisato Ayaka
description: Daughter of the Yashiro Commission's Kamisato Clan. Dignified and elegant, as well as wise and strong.

name: Kamisato Ayato
description: The current head of the Kamisato Clan and the Yashiro Commissioner. He is a man of great intelligence and talent.

name: Baizhu
description: The owner of Bubu Pharmacy, who is rarely seen without the white snake named Changsheng around his neck.

name: Barbara
description: Every inhabitant of Mondstadt loves Barbara. She's the Deaconess of the Church of Favonius and a shining idol.

name: Beidou
description: Captain of the Crux, with quite a reputation in Liyue. Some say she can split even the mountains and part the seas.

name: Bennett
description: A righteous and good-natured adventurer from Mondstadt who's unfortunately extremely unlucky.

name: Candace
description: A descendant of King Deshret with an amber left eye. The defender of Aaru Village.

name: Charlotte
description: A reporter for the Steambird who is always on the hunt for the next big scoop.

name: Chasca
description: The 'Peacemaker' of the Flower-Feather Clan. She is known for her exceptional combat skills.

name: Citlali
description: A master of the Flower-Feather Clan's traditional arts. She is a woman of great intelligence and talent.

name: Chevreuse
description: The captain of the Special Security and Surveillance Patrol, who is always ready to enforce the law.

name: Chiori
description: The owner of Chioriya Boutique. A designer from Inazuma who is famous in Fontaine.

name: Chongyun
description: A young exorcist from a family of exorcists. He has been doing everything he can to suppress his pure yang spirit.

name: Clorinde
description: The Champion Duelist of Fontaine, known for her unmatched skill with the blade.

name: Collei
description: A trainee forest ranger under Tighnari in the Avidya Forest.

name: Cyno
description: The General Mahamatra in charge of supervising the researchers of the Akademiya.

name: Dehya
description: A member of the Eremites, a mercenary organization that roams the sands of Sumeru.

name: Diluc
description: The tycoon of a winery empire in Mondstadt, unmatched in every possible way.

name: Diona
description: The popular bartender of the Cat's Tail tavern, who has a strange mix of cat-like features.

name: Dori
description: A merchant in Sumeru who has a knack for finding rare and valuable items.

name: Emilie
description: A renowned perfumer in Fontaine who is known for her exceptional sense of smell.

name: Eula
description: The Spindrift Knight, a scion of the old aristocracy, and the Captain of the Knights of Favonius Reconnaissance Company.

name: Faruzan
description: A researcher from 'one hundred years ago' who is a master of mechanics and puzzles.

name: Fischl
description: A mysterious girl who calls herself 'Prinzessin der Verurteilung' and travels with a night raven named Oz.

name: Freminet
description: A professional diver in Fontaine who is known for his exceptional skills underwater.

name: Furina
description: The Regina of All Waters, Kindreds, Peoples and Laws. Beloved by her people.

name: Gaming
description: A guard for the Sword and Strongbox Secure Transport Agency, and the leader of the 'Wushou Dancing' troupe.

name: Ganyu
description: The secretary to the Liyue Qixing. The blood of the qilin, an illuminated beast, flows within her veins.

name: Gorou
description: The great general of Watatsumi Island's forces. He is a brave and loyal warrior.

name: Hu Tao
description: The 77th Director of the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor. She took over the business at a rather young age.

name: Arataki Itto
description: The first and greatest head of the Arataki Gang, famed throughout Inazuma City's Hanamizaka.

name: Jean
description: As the Acting Grand Master of the Knights, Jean has always been devoted to her duties and maintaining peace in Mondstadt.

name: Kachina
description: A young warrior from the Children of Echoes in Natlan.
recommendedArtifactSet: Scroll of the Hero of Cinder City (4-Piece)

name: Kaeya
description: In the Knights of Favonius, Kaeya is the most trusted aide for the Acting Grand Master Jean.

name: Kaveh
description: A renowned architect in Sumeru who is known for his exceptional talent and his kind heart.

name: Kaedehara Kazuha
description: A wandering samurai from Inazuma who is currently with the Crux Fleet.

name: Keqing
description: The Yuheng of the Liyue Qixing. Keqing has much to say about Rex Lapis' unilateral approach to policymaking in Liyue.

name: Kinich
description: A Huitztlan Saurian-hunter from Natlan. He is a master of the hunt and a skilled warrior.

name: Kirara
description: A courier for Komaniya Express who is known for her exceptional speed and her cat-like features.

name: Klee
description: Knights of Favonius Spark Knight! Forever accompanied by a bang and a flash!
recommendedWeapon: Lost Prayer to the Sacred Winds

name: Sangonomiya Kokomi
description: The Divine Priestess of Watatsumi Island. All of the island's affairs are at her fingertips.

name: Kuki Shinobu
description: The deputy leader of the Arataki Gang. She is a woman of many talents and a skilled warrior.

name: Layla
description: A student in the Rtawahist Darshan who is known for her exceptional talent and her sleepwalking.

name: Lisa
description: The Librarian of the Knights of Favonius. She is a woman of great intelligence and a skilled mage.

name: Lyney
description: A famous magician in Fontaine. He is known for his incredible magic tricks and his charming personality.

name: Mavuika
description: The current Pyro Archon and the God of War. She is the leader of Natlan.

name: Iansan
description: A young warrior from the Collective of Plenty in Natlan.
recommendedArtifactSet: Scroll of the Hero of Cinder City (4-Piece)

name: Lynette
description: A magician's assistant in Fontaine who is known for her exceptional skills and her cat-like features.

name: Mika
description: A surveyor for the Knights of Favonius Reconnaissance Company who is known for his exceptional skills.

name: Mona
description: An astrologer of great skill and pride. She is a woman of great intelligence and a skilled mage.

name: Mualani
description: A guide from the People of the Springs. She is an expert in navigating the waters of Natlan.

name: Nahida
description: The Lesser Lord Kusanali, who dwells deep within the Sanctuary of Surasthana.

recommendedArtifactStats.circlet: Crit Rate / Crit DMG / Elemental Mastery

name: Navia
description: The President of the Spina di Rosula. She is a woman of great resolve and a skilled warrior.
recommendedArtifactSet: Nighttime Whispers in the Echoing Woods (4-Piece)

name: Neuvillette
description: The Iudex of Fontaine, known for his unassailable impartiality.

name: Nilou
description: A dancer under the Zubayr Theater. Her dancing is as graceful as a lotus in bloom.

name: Ningguang
description: The Tianquan of the Liyue Qixing. She is a woman of great intelligence and a skilled merchant.
recommendedArtifactSet: Nighttime Whispers in the Echoing Woods (4-Piece)
recommendedWeapon: Lost Prayer to the Sacred Winds

name: Noelle
description: A maid in the service of the Knights of Favonius who dreams of joining their ranks someday.

name: Ororon
description: A mysterious warrior from the Masters of the Night-Wind in Natlan.
recommendedArtifactSet: Scroll of the Hero of Cinder City (4-Piece)

name: Kujou Sara
description: A general of the Tenryou Commission. She is a brave and loyal warrior.

name: Qiqi
description: An apprentice and herb gatherer at Bubu Pharmacy. She is a zombie with a pale complexion.

name: Raiden Shogun
description: The Almighty Narukami Ogosho, who promised the people of Inazuma an unchanging Eternity.

name: Razor
description: A boy who lives among the wolves in Wolvendom of Mondstadt, away from human civilization.

name: Rosaria
description: A sister in Mondstadt's Church of Favonius. She is a woman of great intelligence and a skilled warrior.

name: Sayu
description: A ninja from the Shuumatsuban who is known for her exceptional skills and her sleepiness.

name: Sethos
description: A young warrior from the desert who is known for his exceptional skills and his kind heart.

name: Shenhe
description: An ethereal soul amidst the mortal world. A disciple of the Cloud Retainer.

name: Sigewinne
description: The head nurse of the Fortress of Meropide. She is a woman of great resolve and a skilled healer.

name: Sucrose
description: An alchemist with a voracious curiosity regarding the world and everything in it.

name: Tartaglia
description: The Eleventh of the Fatui Harbingers, also known as 'Childe'. He is a man of great resolve and a skilled warrior.

name: Thoma
description: The housekeeper of the Kamisato Clan. He is a man of many talents and a skilled warrior.

name: Tighnari
description: A Forest Watcher in the Avidya Forest. He is a master of botany and a skilled archer.

name: Traveler (Anemo)
description: A traveler from another world who had their only kin taken away, forcing them to embark on a journey to find The Seven.

name: Traveler (Geo)
description: A traveler from another world who had their only kin taken away, forcing them to embark on a journey to find The Seven.

name: Traveler (Electro)
description: A traveler from another world who had their only kin taken away, forcing them to embark on a journey to find The Seven.

name: Traveler (Dendro)
description: A traveler from another world who had their only kin taken away, forcing them to embark on a journey to find The Seven.

name: Traveler (Hydro)
description: A traveler from another world who had their only kin taken away, forcing them to embark on a journey to find The Seven.

name: Venti
description: A bard that seems to have arrived on some unknown wind — sometimes sings songs as old as the hills, and other times sings poems that are as fresh as a daisy.

recommendedArtifactStats.circlet: Crit Rate / Crit DMG / Elemental Mastery

name: Wanderer
description: A wayfarer whose identity is a mystery. He dresses like a mountain ascetic, but he certainly does not act like one.

name: Wriothesley
description: The Duke of the Fortress of Meropide. He is a man of great resolve and a skilled warrior.

name: Xianyun
description: One of the Mighty and Illuminated Adepti of Jueyun Karst, known as 'Cloud Retainer'.

name: Xiao
description: One of the 'Mighty and Illuminated Adepti' guarding Liyue, also heralded as the 'Guardian Yaksha'.

name: Xiangling
description: A renowned chef from Liyue who is always on the hunt for the next big scoop.

name: Xilonen
description: A master smith from the Children of Echoes. She is known for her exceptional craftsmanship and her ability to resolve conflicts.
recommendedArtifactSet: Scroll of the Hero of Cinder City (4-Piece)

name: Xingqiu
description: The second son of the Feiyun Commerce Guild. He has a reputation for being studious and polite.

name: Xinyan
description: Liyue's sole rock 'n' roll musician. She rebels against prejudiced social conventions using her music and passionate fire.

name: Yae Miko
description: The Guuji of the Grand Narukami Shrine and the owner of the Yae Publishing House.

name: Yanfei
description: A legal advisor in Liyue Harbor. She is a woman of great intelligence and a skilled lawyer.
recommendedWeapon: Lost Prayer to the Sacred Winds

name: Yaoyao
description: A young disciple of the Streetward Rambler who is known for her exceptional skills and her kind heart.

name: Yelan
description: A mysterious person who claims to work for the Ministry of Civil Affairs, but is a non-entity on their list.

name: Yoimiya
description: Owner of Naganohara Fireworks. Known as the 'Queen of the Summer Festival'.

name: Yun Jin
description: A renowned opera singer in Liyue Harbor who is known for her exceptional talent and her kind heart.

name: Zhongli
description: A mysterious consultant invited by the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor. Extremely knowledgeable in all things.
